description: You are a sustainability specialist preparing a regionalized LCA model. Create three Location entities for California (Code: US-CA, Lat: 36.7783, Lon: -119.4179), Texas (Code: US-TX, Lat: 31.9686, Lon: -99.9018), and Ohio (Code: US-OH, Lat: 40.4173, Lon: -82.9071). Assign each of these locations to a different manufacturing process within the USLCI database (import from ~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip if needed). Export a CSV report to ~/LCA_Results/location_mapping.csv including the process_name, location_name, location_code, latitude, and longitude for the three assignments.
